title: englerastrum biflorum
intro: Englerastrum biflorum, also known as the "two-flowered Englerastrum," is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds that can be used to treat various health conditions. Englerastrum biflorum is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and stems can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine in Africa.
